/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -mmacosx-version-min=13.0 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/tws_gui_tests.dir/tests/trade_trace_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tws_gui_tests.dir/app_shared.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tws_gui_tests.dir/trace_exporter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tws_gui_tests.dir/trading_ui_format.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tws_gui_tests.dir/mac_observability.mm.o -o tws_gui_tests  ixwebsocket/libixwebsocket.a -framework AppKit /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libz.tbd
